description: auto_review dependency-update config. Renovate runs on Forgejo via the bot's own webhook surface (operators self-hosting can deploy mend/renovate-runner alongside).

packageRules.description: Group Tokio ecosystem so Renovate doesn't open 4 PRs for tokio + tokio-util + ... etc.
Group serde + serde_json + serde_yaml together — they tend to need synchronised bumps.
Group tree-sitter grammars together; they bump in lockstep with core tree-sitter.
Hold tower-http back from automatic majors — middleware behaviour changes can be subtle.
sqlx majors can include schema-incompatible behaviour; require manual review.
Auto-merge patches on dev-deps once CI is green.
